current_repository_implementation: Typed six-family live query protocol and authoritative H1-H3 registry
current_limitation: Registry quality still requires scientific maintenance
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: No replacement needed; contextual system must consume this contract
hypothesis_alignment: H1 MARITIME-OCEANIC; H2 HYDRONIZATION; H3 MARINE-OCEANIC

current_repository_implementation: Protocol projection constraint ledger and per-query/provider audit
current_limitation: Some provider filters may be post-fetch or unsupported

current_repository_implementation: DOI-title-provider source identity cumulative provenance and Jaccard duplicate groups
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Contextual layer should not replace identity logic
validation_metric: identity precision and duplicate crosswalk accuracy

current_repository_implementation: Title subject abstract and legally retained full text; query text provenance-only
current_limitation: Coverage depends on legally retained text availability; vendor transmission requires explicit licensing
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Contextual layer may use only records with explicit third-party processing rights (CC-BY/CC-0 or vendor contract text-mining clause)
validation_metric: evidence-span coverage fabricated-link rate and unsupported-link rate
proposed_acceptance_threshold: 100% span grounding; 0% fabricated links; <1% unsupported non-fabricated links

current_repository_implementation: Versioned deterministic keyword and indicator matching
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Semantic paraphrase extraction with exact spans
validation_metric: precision recall macro-F1 with 95% CI lower bounds
proposed_acceptance_threshold: lower 95% CI: precision >=0.90 and macro-F1 gain >=0.10

current_repository_implementation: No complete dedicated proposition-level negation/modality model
current_limitation: May misread denied hypothetical historic or cited claims
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Classify assertion negation uncertainty recommendation background and result

current_repository_implementation: Signals retain evidence sector axis type and phrase but not a full semantic relation graph
Evidence text can include abstract/full text but matching remains phrase-oriented
current_limitation: Cannot reliably connect methods results limitations and conclusions without demonstration
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Controlled cross-sentence evidence composition (requires benchmark validation)
validation_metric: human adjudicated claim accuracy with dev/eval split
proposed_acceptance_threshold: improvement over expanded deterministic baseline on held-out evaluation set

current_repository_implementation: Signed Cohen's d for MARITIME versus OCEANIC plus matched H1 fragment count
current_limitation: Depends on upstream signal validity and demand model
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Contextual support/contradiction labels with spans; must not alter axis contrast

current_repository_implementation: HYDRONIZATION demand-level missing validated EQF 6-7 supply; candidates separated
current_limitation: Validated supply map may be unavailable; extracted demand relations can be incomplete
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Extract demand-to-credential and demand-to-EQF relations with evidence
validation_metric: relation F1 and false validated-supply rate

current_repository_implementation: MARINE/OCEANIC matched-fragment balance and evidence/signal bridge overlap
current_limitation: Lexical registries can miss semantic bridges
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Contextual bridge detection with exact shared evidence spans
validation_metric: bridge precision recall and direction agreement

current_repository_implementation: Stable evidence/signal identities repeated/duplicate exclusions and query/provider diversity
current_limitation: Classifier-version changes require careful historical comparison
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Contextual outputs need stable versioned semantic identities
validation_metric: false-new rate across frozen repeat runs
proposed_acceptance_threshold: no false novelty on identical frozen replay

current_repository_implementation: Deterministic location-based confidence and manual-review states
current_limitation: Score is not a probability of correctness
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Calibrated probabilities plus conservative review queue

current_repository_implementation: Evidence-linked candidate outcomes and candidate-vs-validated coverage states
current_limitation: Outcome wording and relations are still templated
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Generate structured candidates only with evidence spans and EQF rationale
validation_metric: expert acceptance rate and unsupported-claim rate
proposed_acceptance_threshold: no fabricated evidence; candidate status preserved

current_repository_implementation: Manifests checksums current-run guards reports and release ZIP
current_limitation: External model reproducibility and vendor retention may be weak
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Record model prompt schema settings hashes and replay metadata

current_repository_implementation: Current deterministic extraction has low marginal runtime cost
current_limitation: Manual review and low recall may dominate total cost
paid_contextual_layer_required_addition: Paid layer must reduce adjudication time and improve valid recall
proposed_acceptance_threshold: below pre-approved budget ceiling and >=30% time saving
